message:
fix: prevent orphaned wisps from becoming permanently unreapable

Two fixes in the wisp reaper:

1. batchDeleteRows now cleans up reverse dependency references
   (depends_on_id) when purging parent wisps. Previously only
   issue_id references were deleted, leaving children with dangling
   parent pointers that made them invisible to both reaper branches
   in parentCheckWhere.

2. parentCheckWhere now handles dangling parent references via a
   LEFT JOIN + IS NULL branch. Children whose parent was purged
   (dependency record exists but parent row is gone) are now
   eligible for reaping instead of being permanently stuck.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
